retry_reason: Failure to get the clock indicates a missing clock in the device tree; retrying will not change the tree.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to obtain and initialize a timer clock (prepare, enable, get rate) for use by the ARC timer driver. The of_clk_get is just one step in this initialization process. The function does not expose the clk object to the caller; instead it stores the clock rate in a global variable. Hence it is not a refcount wrapper.
judge.retry_reason: Failure to get the clock indicates a missing clock in the device tree; retrying will not change the tree.
